nasb.text: But he was unwilling and went and threw him in prison until he should pay back what was owed.

esv.text: He refused and went and put him in prison until he should pay the debt.

cnv.text: 他卻不肯，反而把他帶走，關在監裡，等他把所欠的還清。

ccb.text: “那奴仆却不肯，竟把同伴送进监狱，直到他还清债务为止。

csbs.text: 可是他不肯，反而把这人投进监狱，直到这人能还清所欠的债。
